__doc__: Allow-list for lint-icon-action.mjs (taxonomy C11). Entries: { testid?: substring, file?: substring, action?: key, reason }. A matching control is excused from the icon<->action check.

entries.reason: External (URL-only) inline resource links keep an open-in-new-tab affordance (no file bytes to download). It renders `FileOutput` (file-export glyph) rather than `ExternalLink`; allow-listed as a tracked C11 deviation. File-backed previews use Download instead (no open-in-new-tab).
